name: EverMemory
description: Deterministic memory plugin for OpenClaw with governed write/recall behavior.

enabled.description: Master switch for the EverMemory plugin. Set false to disable all memory operations without removing config.

databasePath.description: File path for the SQLite database (WAL mode). Use ':memory:' for ephemeral in-memory storage (no persistence). Default: .openclaw/memory/evermemory/store/evermemory.db (relative to OpenClaw context directory).

bootTokenBudget.description: Maximum token budget for the session boot briefing injected at sessionStart. Larger values surface more context but consume more context window. Default: 1200.

maxRecall.description: Maximum number of memories returned by evermemory_recall per query. Higher values improve recall coverage but increase latency. Default: 10.

debugEnabled.description: Enable write_decision and retrieval debug event logging. Useful for diagnosing why memories were accepted or rejected. Adds minor write overhead. Default: true.

semantic.description: Semantic (vector) search configuration. Semantic search enables meaning-based recall beyond keyword matching.

enabled.description: Enable semantic vector search. When true, memories are embedded and a hybrid keyword+semantic retrieval is used. Requires @xenova/transformers (local) or OPENAI_API_KEY (openai provider). Default: true.

maxCandidates.description: Maximum candidate memories fetched from the semantic index before re-ranking. Higher values improve recall at the cost of latency. Default: 30.

minScore.description: Minimum cosine similarity score [0–1] for a semantic candidate to qualify. Lower values surface more results; higher values are stricter. Default: 0.3.

intent.description: Intent classification configuration. Intent signals guide write/recall policy decisions.

useLLM.description: Enable optional LLM-based intent enrichment for messages that exceed heuristic confidence. Adds one LLM call per ambiguous message. Default: false.

fallbackHeuristics.description: Fall back to rule-based heuristics when LLM intent classification is unavailable or disabled. Strongly recommended to keep true. Default: true.

retrieval.description: Retrieval scoring weight configuration. All weight groups are auto-normalized to sum to 1.0 — you only need to set relative values.

keywordWeights.description: Scoring weights for keyword/structured retrieval ranking. Values are relative — they are normalized automatically.

keyword.description: Weight for keyword match score (TF-IDF / Jaccard overlap). Higher values favor text similarity.

recency.description: Weight for recency (how recently the memory was updated). Higher values favor newer memories.

importance.description: Weight for the memory's importance score [0–1]. Higher values surface high-importance memories first.

confidence.description: Weight for the memory's confidence score [0–1]. Higher values surface high-confidence memories first.

explicitness.description: Weight for explicitness score [0–1]. Higher values favor explicitly stated facts over inferred ones.

scopeMatch.description: Bonus weight when a memory's scope exactly matches the query scope (userId, chatId, project). Increase to prefer local memories.

typePriority.description: Weight for memory type priority (identity > constraint > preference > ...). Higher values prefer higher-priority types.

lifecyclePriority.description: Weight for lifecycle priority (semantic > episodic > working). Higher values prefer mature memories.

hybridWeights.description: Blend weights for hybrid retrieval (keyword + semantic + base score). Values are normalized automatically.

keyword.description: Weight of the keyword ranking component in hybrid blending.

semantic.description: Weight of the semantic (vector similarity) component in hybrid blending.

base.description: Weight of the base structural score (recency, importance, lifecycle) in hybrid blending.

bootTokenBudget.label: Boot Token Budget
bootTokenBudget.help: Max tokens for the session boot briefing

maxRecall.label: Max Recall
maxRecall.help: Maximum recall items for each query

debugEnabled.label: Debug Events
debugEnabled.help: Enable debug event logging for explainability

semantic.enabled.label: Semantic Search
semantic.enabled.help: Enable vector-based semantic search (local or OpenAI)

semantic.minScore.label: Semantic Min Score
semantic.minScore.help: Minimum cosine similarity [0–1] for semantic results

retrieval.hybridWeights.semantic.label: Semantic Blend Weight
retrieval.hybridWeights.semantic.help: Relative weight of semantic score in hybrid retrieval
